name: imr3R_innermost_repeat
description: Innermost-repeat subdomain imr3R of S. pombe centromere 3 on chromosome III, right side. Contains a cluster of tRNA genes that define the boundary between the CENP-A^Cnp1-loaded cnt central core and the H3K9me-Swi6-silenced otr outer repeats. Sequence is partially repetitive with otr-like and unique segments; multi-maps to the contralateral imr.
expected_copy_count: 1 of 2 imr copies (L and R) within centromere
